data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Family package pricing (shared pool)', but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. While the linked use case mentions a family having a '10 swim lessons' package shared across all members, there is no concrete evidence or API interaction to substantiate that this requirement is satisfied. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or state checks confirming 'Family package pricing (shared pool)'.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
